case_title: WONG, CHRISTINA VS RIVERA, VICTOR (AUGUST SUPPLY, INC.)

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT RIVERA, VICTOR (AUGUST SUPPLY, INC.)
